markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO performance and align on future strategy and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Looker Dashboard Unlocked:** The Looker dashboard (GSC/GA4) is now shared, providing self-serve access to pillar-level performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [**AI Ranking Threat:** Dell Tech is outranking Monograph for AI keywords, a critical threat requiring immediate analysis of their site-wide optimization strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Reporting Gaps Closed:** Monograph's internal Metabase report will be integrated to track organic content's influence on Sales Qualified Opportunities (SQOs).](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** Future content will balance high-volume top-of-funnel (ToFu) traffic with high-intent keywords aligned with Monograph's ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)

## Topics

### AI Ranking Threat: Dell Tech

  - [**Problem:** Dell Tech is outranking Monograph for AI-related keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** Dell Tech's entire site is better optimized for AI, not just specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Urgency:** This is a critical threat that must be addressed immediately to avoid falling behind.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Data Source:** Current AI insights come from the Scrunch platform, which provides site-wide data, not per-article breakdowns.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Future Tool:** Growth X is building an in-house AI visibility tracker with a richer prompt library for deeper insights.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Reporting & Data Access

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Now shared with Allison.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
      - [**Data Sources:** GSC (clicks/impressions) & GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**Key Feature:** Filterable by "Growth X specific content" and by content pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**Metabase Report (SQOs):** Monograph's internal report will be integrated into Growth X's reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Track organic content's influence on Sales Qualified Opportunities (SQOs).](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Attribution:** Last-touch influence (e.g., blog visit → demo request).](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**Performance:** 11 SQOs in Dec 2025; 9 already in Jan 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [**Action:** Allison will export the report monthly for Katya. Katya may request direct Metabase access.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Performance Deep Dive

  - [**AI Implementation Pillar:** Engagement data is skewed by a mix of content types.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [**High-Intent Pages:** Lower traffic but higher engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [**Listicles:** High traffic but lower engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**CRM Pillar:** November data is not a reliable baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Reason:** Only 3 articles were published in November.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Action:** Analyze December data (from \~15 articles) for a more accurate view.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

### Future Strategy & Tracking

  - [**New Pillars:** Allison shared updated content pillars. Katya will review them to adjust Looker cohorts.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Keyword Tracking:** Allison requested keyword tracking by pillar, especially for high-intent topics like "billing and invoicing architect software," to demonstrate clear wins.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Status:** Keyword data is in Airtable; Katya will investigate adding it to Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Analyze Dell Tech's AI ranking strategy, looping in Growth X's AO experts.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Review new content pillars from Allison to propose Looker cohort adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Investigate adding pillar-specific keyword tracking to the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Allison:**](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [Export the Metabase SQO report monthly for Katya.](https://fathom.video/share/uhVom5EDV-xa5gKd63NP8ufcYZf8dww4?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
